description: Ollama NDJSON streaming with a single tool call. Handcrafted contract fixture validating tool-input start/end and final tool-call emission in canonical v3 parts.

source.notes: Handcrafted fixture because upstream AI SDK does not ship Ollama NDJSON streaming captures. This fixture uses Ollama's NDJSON stream format (not SSE).

notes: Ollama streaming tool calls do not provide stable server-assigned call ids; ids are synthesized from function names.
